/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libv2x_emergency__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libv2x_emergency__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/v2x_emergency__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/v2x_emergency/msg/detail/priority_request__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/v2x_emergency__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/v2x_emergency/msg/detail/signal_status__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/v2x_emergency__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/v2x_emergency/msg/detail/priority_grant__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/workspaces/Qcar/build/v2x_emergency:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libv2x_emergency__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
